fields.name: Faiz Muhammad
fields.message: The shop I rented was sold without informing me. What are my rights?

fields.name: Hina Shah
fields.message: My husband left and has not provided maintenance for 6 months.

fields.name: Nadia Bibi
fields.message: I have a land dispute with my neighbour in Mingora. Need urgent legal help.

fields.name: Hamid Ullah
fields.message: I was dismissed from my job without notice. Want to know my options.

fields.name: Samina Kosar
fields.message: Bank is pressuring me for a loan I already paid. Need legal support.

fields.name: Abdul Qadir
fields.message: My father passed away and siblings are not giving me my inheritance share.

fields.name: Rukhsana Gul
fields.message: My husband has filed for divorce. I want to know my rights regarding children.

fields.name: Gulshan Ara
fields.message: I want to challenge a government order that affected my business.

fields.name: Muhammad Ishaq
fields.message: Police registered a false FIR against me. Looking for bail and defence.

fields.name: Fawad Ahmed
fields.message: Our family property was occupied illegally. Need to file a case.
